title: Simply More x Excalibur
description: Excalibur texturing integrated into Simply More
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Simply More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-more) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur) resource pack.

**Credits:**

*   \* [Maffhew](https://www.curseforge.com/members/maffhew/projects) – Creator of Excalibur
    *   [Sweenuss](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sweenuss/projects)\- Creator of [Simply More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-more)
